title: ‘TMC is Tukde Mein Congress’: BJP Takes Fresh Dig at Trinamool After Senior MP Kalyan Banerjee Puts Mamata in a Spot
description: Senior TMC MP Kalyan Banerjee has questioned the leadership style of Abhishek Banerjee, putting party supremo Mamata Banerjee in a difficult position. Reacting to it, BJP's Shehzad Poonawalla said that the TMC is in "complete tukde mode" with their Rajya Sabha MPs quitting & Lok Sabha MPs going away
